Project: MonkeyUI
Website: https://monkeyui.com
Repository: https://github.com/MonkeyUI-dev/MonkeyUI-www
Description: MonkeyUI is a UI/UX knowledge base that helps developers generate high-intent interfaces using style DNA and MCP workflows.

Primary pages:
- https://monkeyui.com/en
- https://monkeyui.com/zh-CN

Full context:
- https://monkeyui.com/llms-full.txt
